Thanks for taking the time to contribute! 🙏

### 🚀 Getting Started

1. Fork the repository
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/badhope.github.io.git`
3. Install dependencies: `npm install`
4. Start development server: `npm run dev`

### 🎯 Ways to Contribute

- 🐛 Report bugs
- ✨ Suggest new features
- 📝 Improve documentation
- 🔧 Submit pull requests

### 📝 Before You Start

Make sure to read our [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/badhope/badhope.github.io/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for coding standards and commit guidelines.

Happy coding! ⭐
